name: build
summary: TypeScript build completes for current source

name: smoke-tests
summary: Static and adapter smoke tests pass

name: smoke-tests
stdoutTail:
✓ Test 11: AWS CLI config, safety classification, and broker policy evidence behave as expected
✓ Test 12: Resume prompt exposes AWS tool guidance when enabled
✓ Test 13: Git finalization config and prompt guidance behave as expected
✓ Test 14: Model allowlist restricts stale/unapproved models
✓ Test 15: Central policy, broker, and provider manifest contracts validate effects
✓ Test 16: Isolated writer worktree captures patch without touching main worktree
✓ Test 17: Event replay reconstructs new run state and rejects hash-chain tampering
✓ Test 18: New-run replay corruption does not silently reconstruct from stale cache
✓ Test 19: ReleaseAuthorization is invalidated by a new HEAD
✓ Test 20: Structured PR body generation includes evidence matrix and authorization
✓ Test 21: Cyber runtime redaction, IPI wrapping, signing, attestation verification, and CAS route policy work
✓ Test 22: Durable task plan persists, renders, and blocks evaluator completion while active
✓ Test 23: Project instruction discovery persists, replays, and renders into prompts
✓ Test 24: Repo context tool reads, searches, redacts, wraps, and attests evidence
✓ Test 25: Z.ai GLM 5.2 provider metadata and probe behavior are valid
✓ Test 26: Provider env materializer gates Secrets Manager writes to the approved control account without printing secrets
✓ Test 27: Production security review runner parses the handoff and enforces read-only mode

All tests passed. ✓

name: zai-live-probe
summary: Live Z.ai GLM-5.2 endpoint responds headlessly

name: zai-live-probe
stdoutTail:
> pi-iterative-goal@0.1.0 probe:zai
> npm run build && node scripts/probe-zai-glm52.mjs --env-file .env


> pi-iterative-goal@0.1.0 build
> tsc

probe_zai_glm52
  ok: true
  status: 200
  model: glm-5.2
  base_url: https://api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4
  latency_ms: 7185
  env_files_loaded: 1
    - /Users/joe/Projects/pi-iterative-goal/.env: ZAI_API_BASE_URL, ZAI_API_KEY, ZAI_DEFAULT_MODEL, ZAI_DEFAULT_VISION_MODEL
  response_text: OK

name: extension-headless-flow
summary: Extension tools and commands run in a disposable headless Pi harness

name: goal_shell
description: Run a shell command with safety allowlists. Use this instead of bash when bash may be unavailable. Destructive commands require explicit allowDestructive=true and operator approval.

name: goal_aws_cli
description: Run approved AWS CLI commands with profile resolution, preflight, and safety policies.

name: goal_git
description: Run guarded git and GitHub finalization actions for iterative-goal runs.

name: goal_repo_context
description: Read, list, or search repository files with path containment, DLP/IPI processing, and evidence attestation.

name: goal_subagent
description: Delegate scouting/research tasks to subagents when a subagent backend is available. When no backend is detected, falls back to single-agent scouting in the current session. Do not call 'subagent' or 'Agent' tools directly; use goal_subagent.

name: goal_report_phase_result
description: MANDATORY: Call at end of each phase. Must include runId and phaseAttemptId from the phase prompt's [HARNESS_META] block.

name: cyber_report_phase_result
description: MANDATORY cyber alias for reporting phase results after DLP/IPI processing. Completion remains evaluator-only.

name: goal_record_blocker
description: Record a blocker. Must include runId and phaseAttemptId from [HARNESS_META].

name: cyber_record_blocker
description: Record a cyber blocker with type and severity. Must include runId and phaseAttemptId from [HARNESS_META].

name: cyber_request_approval
description: Suspend the run and request explicit operator approval for a dangerous or production-impacting action.

name: goal_update_task_plan
description: Replace the durable task checklist for the active run. Use for multi-step coding coordination and compaction recovery.

name: goal_request_capability_repair
description: Request that a missing capability be restored.

name: goal_checkpoint
description: Force a state checkpoint.

name: cyber_checkpoint
description: Force a DLP-aware cyber state checkpoint.

name: goal-start
description: Start an autonomous iterative goal loop

name: goal-status
description: Show status (--json for machine output)

name: goal-pause
description: Pause the loop

name: goal-resume
description: Resume paused loop

name: goal-approve
description: Approve a pending cyber approval token

name: goal-deny
description: Deny a pending cyber approval token

name: goal-repair-capabilities
description: Run capability preflight and fix

name: goal-finalize
description: Finalize: generate patch. --mode patch (default).

name: goal-reset
description: Reset state

name: goal-authorize-release
description: Run the local pre-PR release authorization gate for the current HEAD

name: goal-audit
description: Show audit pointers for the active iterative-goal run

name: goal-replay
description: Replay the active run event log and compare core state

name: goal-trace
description: Trace requirement or evidence text in run artifacts: /goal-trace <term>

name: goal-dashboard
description: Show iterative-goal dashboard
